form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months 2nd of 8 at Rosehill in the G1 Tancred on March 28 over 2400m, on a slow track; neck behind Aeliana with 59kg at $3.60. Previously second-up 2nd of 7 at Longchamp in the G2 Conseil De Pari on October 19 over 2200m, head behind Convergent with 58kg at $4.70. Going well and the addition of blinkers will make it interesting, top-three player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Second run back. First-up after three months 2nd of 8 at Rosehill in the G1 Tancred on March 28 over 2400m, on a slow track; neck behind Aeliana with 59kg at $3.60. Previously second-up 2nd of 7 at Longchamp in the G2 Conseil De Pari on October 19 over 2200m, head behind Convergent with 58kg at $4.70. Going well and the addition of blinkers will make it interesting, top-three player.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the 2000m, steadied from the heels of Circle Of Fire.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. First-up raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 9 at this track in the G1 V Elleegant on February 28 over 1600m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Autumn Glow with 59kg at $8. Last start got back early 3rd in a small field at Rosehill in the G1 Ranvet on March 21 over 2000m, on a slow track; 1.1 len behind Aeliana with 59kg at $3. Ready to peak and expect to see him closer to the speed, go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Last start got back early 3rd in a small field at Rosehill in the G1 Ranvet on March 21 over 2000m, on a slow track; 1.1 len behind Aeliana with 59kg at $3. Ready to peak and expect to see him closer to the speed, go close.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start bumped on the hindquarter by Aeliana.
Bumped Anemacore shortly after the start. Over-raced in the middle stages.

form.formComment: Last start raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by a nose at Flemington G1 Aust Cup March 28 over 2000m on a soft track defeating Pride Of Jenni carrying 59kg at $21. The run before that 4th of 7 at Caulfield in the G2 Peter Young Stk on March 14 over 1800m, 2 len behind Birdman with 59kg at $4.20. Hard to see him peak again for this.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Last start raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by a nose at Flemington G1 Aust Cup March 28 over 2000m on a soft track defeating Pride Of Jenni carrying 59kg at $21. The run before that 4th of 7 at Caulfield in the G2 Peter Young Stk on March 14 over 1800m, 2 len behind Birdman with 59kg at $4.20. Hard to see him peak again for this.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin. Near the 100m, shifted out under pressure.
Laid out under pressure in the straight.

form.formComment: At the latest run rolled along in front then was edged out late 2nd in a small field at Rosehill in the G1 Ranvet on March 21 over 2000m, slow going neck behind Aeliana with 59kg at $16. The race before that did the work up front then tired ran last of 9 at this track in the G1 V Elleegant on February 28 over 1600m, on a slow track; 13 len behind Autumn Glow carrying 59kg at $21. Can run his usual honest race in this tougher contest.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). At the latest run rolled along in front then was edged out late 2nd in a small field at Rosehill in the G1 Ranvet on March 21 over 2000m, slow going neck behind Aeliana with 59kg at $16. The race before that did the work up front then tired ran last of 9 at this track in the G1 V Elleegant on February 28 over 1600m, on a slow track; 13 len behind Autumn Glow carrying 59kg at $21. Can run his usual honest race in this tougher contest.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start, taken Aeliana out.
In the early part of the straight, inclined to lay in.
Brushed the running rail after passing the 400m.

form.formComment: Last start ran on from midfield and won by 2.75 len at Rosehill G2 Sellwood March 28 over 2000m on a rain affected track defeating Caviar Heights with 56.5kg at $5.50. The run before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 7 at Rosehill in the G3 Sky High on March 14 over 2000m, 4.5 len behind Vauban carrying 56.5kg at $2.60. Tested at this level.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). Last start ran on from midfield and won by 2.75 len at Rosehill G2 Sellwood March 28 over 2000m on a rain affected track defeating Caviar Heights with 56.5kg at $5.50. The run before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 7 at Rosehill in the G3 Sky High on March 14 over 2000m, 4.5 len behind Vauban carrying 56.5kg at $2.60. Tested at this level.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: On jumping shifted out and bumped Vauban.
Laid out under pressure in the straight.
Raced keenly in the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after seven months 2nd of 7 at Rosehill in the G2 Sellwood on March 28 over 2000m, on a slow track; 2.75 len behind Wootton Verni carrying 56kg at $4.20. Previously second-up 2nd in a small field at Windsor in the LR August Stks on August 23 over 2313m, neck behind Arabian Crown carrying 60.5kg at $2.50. Needs it much easier.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). Second run back. First-up after seven months 2nd of 7 at Rosehill in the G2 Sellwood on March 28 over 2000m, on a slow track; 2.75 len behind Wootton Verni carrying 56kg at $4.20. Previously second-up 2nd in a small field at Windsor in the LR August Stks on August 23 over 2313m, neck behind Arabian Crown carrying 60.5kg at $2.50. Needs it much easier.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung left in the final furlong.

form.formComment: Puts an unbeaten record on the line. When well in the market, favourite; ran on from midfield and won by a long-neck at this track G1 V Elleegant February 28 over 1600m on a rain affected track defeating Aeliana with 57kg at $1.26. Last time out favourite; ran on from midfield and won by 2.75 len at Rosehill G1 Geo Ryder March 21 over 1500m on a rain affected track defeating Gringotts with 57kg at $1.28. Freakish mare expected to get the job done in her stiffest test to date.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). Puts an unbeaten record on the line. When well in the market, favourite; ran on from midfield and won by a long-neck at this track G1 V Elleegant February 28 over 1600m on a rain affected track defeating Aeliana with 57kg at $1.26. Last time out favourite; ran on from midfield and won by 2.75 len at Rosehill G1 Geo Ryder March 21 over 1500m on a rain affected track defeating Gringotts with 57kg at $1.28. Freakish mare expected to get the job done in her stiffest test to date.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: On jumping shifted in and bumped Encap.
Lost its off-fore plate after the 200m.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by a neck at Rosehill G1 Tancred March 28 over 2400m on a soft track defeating Dubai Honour carrying 56.5kg at $1.70. The race before that favourite; was well back until straightening; raced back then made ground from the turn; won by a neck at Rosehill G1 Ranvet March 21 over 2000m on a soft track defeating Lindermann with 57kg at $1.60. Back 400m for this and hard to see her turning the tables on Autumn Glow

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin. Near the 350m tightened for room by Light Infantry Man.
Bounded at the start and lost ground.
